workContext.title: Rework lease validity so task and claim records carry durable lease-boundary facts while runtime liveness comes from runtime refs, making lease freshness a join instead of a global summary rewrite.
workContext.summary: Rework task and claim lease validity so durable lease-boundary facts stay in task/claim shards and runtime liveness is joined from runtime refs instead of forcing global summary rewrites.
workContext.planTitle: Implement shared coordination v1 architecture hardening
